name: Siemens SM 1231 Analog Input Module (8 AI)
description: The Siemens SM 1231 analog input module provides 8 analog inputs for the S7-1200 PLC system. Each channel is configurable for voltage, current, or thermocouple measurement with 13-bit resolution.
technicalDescription: 8-channel analog input module with 13-bit resolution and per-channel diagnostics. Supports 0-10V, 0-20mA, 4-20mA, and thermocouple types J and K. Removable terminal block for easy wiring.
features: 8 analog input channels in compact form factor
Per-channel configuration for voltage, current, or TC
Per-channel diagnostics and wire break detection
Removable front connector for easy maintenance
benefits: Reduces wiring with sensor supply terminals
Flexible channel configuration reduces spare modules needed
seoDescription: Siemens SM 1231 8-channel analog input module for S7-1200. 13-bit, voltage, current, and thermocouple inputs.

faq.question: What is the maximum update rate?
faq.answer: With 8 channels enabled, total conversion time is 8 ms (1 ms per channel).

faq.question: Can different input types be mixed?
faq.answer: Yes, each channel can be independently configured for voltage, current, or thermocouple input.

faq.question: Does this module require external power?
faq.answer: Power is supplied from the S7-1200 backplane; no external power supply needed.

name: Allen-Bradley ControlLogix Power Supply 1756-PA75
description: The Allen-Bradley 1756-PA75 is a 75W AC power supply for the ControlLogix chassis. It provides isolated power to the backplane for all modules in the chassis.
shortDescription: 75W AC power supply for ControlLogix chassis, 120/240 VAC input.
technicalDescription: Standard-duty AC power supply for ControlLogix chassis. 120/240 VAC auto-ranging input, 75W continuous output, and field-replaceable fan. Provides backplane power and includes power OK relay contact.
features: Power OK relay contact for diagnostics
benefits: Reliable power for up to 12 ControlLogix modules
Power OK relay enables remote monitoring
seoDescription: Allen-Bradley 1756-PA75 75W AC power supply for ControlLogix chassis. 120/240 VAC, auto-ranging, with power OK relay.

faq.question: How many modules can this power supply support?
faq.answer: Typically supports up to 8-12 ControlLogix modules depending on module power consumption.

faq.question: Can multiple power supplies be used in one chassis?
faq.answer: Yes, for high-power configurations, redundant power supplies can be installed in the chassis.

faq.question: What is the part number revision B?
faq.answer: The /B revision includes improved fan design and extended-temperature rating.

name: Schneider Modicon M580 Rack 12 Slot
description: The Schneider BMEXBP1200 is a 12-slot backplane rack for the Modicon M580 automation platform. It provides power distribution and communication between CPU, I/O, and communication modules.
shortDescription: 12-slot rack for Modicon M580, Ethernet backplane, DIN rail mount.
technicalDescription: 12-slot Ethernet backplane rack for Modicon M580. Provides backplane power distribution and high-speed Ethernet communication between modules. DIN rail mountable with removable end caps.
features: Removable end caps for module access
seoDescription: Schneider BMEXBP1200 12-slot Ethernet backplane rack for Modicon M580. DIN rail mount, high-speed backplane communication.

faq.question: What modules can be installed?
faq.answer: All M580 CPU, I/O, communication, and special function modules designed for the M580 platform.

faq.question: Is the backplane hot-swappable?
faq.answer: Modules can be hot-swapped in the rack. The rack itself must be powered down for installation.

faq.question: What is the distance between slots?
faq.answer: Slots are on 25mm centers, with total rack width of 482mm.

name: Siemens Profibus FC Standard Cable (100m)
description: Siemens Profibus FC (FastConnect) standard cable for Profibus DP and MPI networks. This 100-meter drum provides reliable communication between PLCs, drives, and distributed I/O stations.
shortDescription: Profibus FC standard cable, 100m drum, 2-wire shielded, for DP/MPI networks.
technicalDescription: Profibus DP/MPI cable with 2-wire twisted pair, braided shield, and PE outer jacket. Designed for FastConnect stripping tool for quick connector installation. Cat 5 specification for 12 Mbit/s transmission.
features: PE outer jacket for industrial environments
benefits: Reduces installation time with FastConnect stripping
Reliable communication in electrically noisy environments
seoDescription: Siemens 6XV1830-0EH10 Profibus FC standard cable, 100m drum, 2-wire shielded, 12 Mbit/s. For DP and MPI networks.

faq.question: What connectors work with this cable?
faq.answer: Siemens Profibus FastConnect connectors (6ES7972-0BA12-0XA0) provide quick termination without stripping individual wires.

faq.question: What is the maximum segment length?
faq.answer: Maximum segment length is 1,200m at 93.75 kbit/s and 200m at 12 Mbit/s with standard cable.

faq.question: Can this cable be used outdoors?
faq.answer: The standard PVC jacket is for indoor use. For outdoor installation, use the outdoor PE jacket variant (6XV1830-0EH10).

name: Siemens ET 200SP Digital Output Module (8 DO)
description: The Siemens ET 200SP digital output module provides 8 digital outputs with 0.5A per channel for solenoid valves, contactors, and indicator lights. Compact design with push-in terminals for fast wiring.
shortDescription: Digital output module, 8 channels, 24VDC, 0.5A, push-in terminals, ET 200SP.
technicalDescription: 8-channel digital output module with 24 VDC, 0.5 A per channel, short-circuit and overload protection. Push-in terminal technology for tool-less wiring. Module diagnostics via LED and software.
features: Can be hot-swapped in ET 200SP system
benefits: Fast installation with push-in wiring technology
Compact design saves space in distributed I/O cabinets

technicalSpecifications.Output Current: 0.5 A per channel (2 A per module max)

seoTitle: Siemens ET 200SP Digital Output Module | 8 DO
seoDescription: Siemens ET 200SP digital output module, 8 channels, 24VDC, 0.5A, push-in terminals. For valve and actuator control in distributed I/O.

faq.question: What is the maximum cable length?
faq.answer: Maximum unshielded cable length is 30m. For longer runs, shield termination is recommended.

faq.question: Can outputs be paralleled?
faq.answer: Yes, outputs can be paralleled for higher current (max 2A total per module).

faq.question: What is the inrush current capability?
faq.answer: The module can handle up to 2A peak for 100ms for lamp load inrush.

name: Allen-Bradley POINT I/O EtherNet/IP Adapter 1734-AENTR
description: The Allen-Bradley 1734-AENTR is a dual-port EtherNet/IP adapter for POINT I/O distributed I/O systems. It connects up to 25 I/O modules to a ControlLogix or CompactLogix controller via EtherNet/IP.
shortDescription: Dual-port EtherNet/IP adapter for POINT I/O, up to 25 modules, DLR support.
technicalDescription: Dual-port EtherNet/IP network adapter for POINT I/O modular distributed I/O. Supports Device Level Ring (DLR) topology, up to 25 I/O modules per adapter, and produces/consumes I/O data via implicit messaging.
features: Supports up to 25 POINT I/O modules
Compatible with all POINT I/O module types
benefits: Reduces wiring with distributed I/O architecture
Ring topology reduces cable faults with network redundancy
seoDescription: Allen-Bradley 1734-AENTR dual-port EtherNet/IP adapter for POINT I/O distributed I/O. DLR support, 25 modules, web diagnostics.

faq.question: How many modules can be connected?
faq.answer: Up to 25 POINT I/O modules can be connected to a single 1734-AENTR adapter.

faq.question: What is DLR topology?
faq.answer: DLR (Device Level Ring) provides network redundancy. If a cable is cut, the network continues operating through the alternate path.

faq.question: What configuration software is required?
faq.answer: Can be configured via web browser for basic settings or RSLogix 5000 / Studio 5000 for full integration.
